page: Microsoft Azure E4ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Edsv7 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Local storage is supported by a 236 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

In benchmark evaluations, the E4ds_v7 demonstrates strong single-threaded performance, particularly in gzip compression where it achieves top-tier results of 34.96 GB/sec, and bzip3 decompression at 14.44 GB/sec. However, multi-core and multi-threaded performance metrics, such as stress-ng multi-core and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression, fall into the weaker category. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance for large uncached blocks at 44.69 GB/sec, but write speeds and small-block read speeds are relatively weak. Database operations and medium-sized LLM inference tasks also show lower relative performance.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E4ds_v7 offers high memory density relative to its vCPU count, making it a viable option for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel processing power. The inclusion of local storage and Premium Storage compatibility adds value for data-caching scenarios. This server is best suited for workloads such as memory-intensive web serving, caching layers, single-threaded data processing, and lightweight database operations.
description: Microsoft Azure E4ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv7 family, featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz. It provides 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio, alongside a 236 GB local disk with Premium Storage capability. Under benchmark testing, the server excels in single-threaded tasks, achieving top-tier gzip compression speeds of 34.96 GB/sec and strong bzip3 decompression. However, its multi-core processing and memory write bandwidth are relatively weak. This hardware profile makes the E4ds_v7 qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy applications that do not demand intensive multi-threaded compute. It is well-suited for caching systems, single-threaded data processing, and general-purpose web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E4ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and a 236 GB local disk, optimized for single-threaded data processing.
